name: PicoClaw
compose:
name: slashnode-picoclaw
services:
  server:
    image: docker.io/sipeed/picoclaw:v0.2.9-launcher
    container_name: picoclaw
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PICOCLAW_GATEWAY_HOST: "0.0.0.0"
      PICOCLAW_HOME: /data
    volumes:
      - server_data:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:18800:18800
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-picoclaw_server_data
